mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.subject AS SUBJECT, cat.name AS CATEGORY_NAME, p.view_count AS VIEW_COUNT, p.created_at AS CREATE_DATE, p.updated_at AS UPDATE_DATE FROM tb_post AS p LEFT JOIN tb_category cat ON p.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN tb_post_tag_map AS MAP ON MAP.post_id = p.id
AND p.public_access = true AND p.status = 'PUB'
AND p.category_id IN ( SELECT id FROM tb_category WHERE
/* TODO : 당장은 양쪽 라이크로 하지만 차후에는 category.id를 가지고 fullpath를 가져온 다음 fullpath로 like 검색을 하자 */ cat.full_path LIKE CONCAT('%/', #{category.id}, '/%')
)
AND
${searchCondition.logic.code}
LOWER(p.subject) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{key.name}), '%')
LOWER(p.normal_body) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{key.name}), '%')
(LOWER(p.subject) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{key.name}), '%') OR LOWER(p.normal_body) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{key.name}), '%'))
AND map.tag_id IN
CAST(#{tag.id} AS BIGINT)
GROUP BY p.id, p.subject, cat.name, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at
SELECT id FROM tb_post WHERE subject is null OR subject = ''
SELECT id FROM tb_post WHERE public_access = true AND status = 'PUB'
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_post SET main_page = CASE WHEN id = #{id} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.subject, cat.name AS CATEGORY_NAME, p.created_at AS CREATE_DATE, COALESCE(tag_match.common_tag_count, 0) AS COMMON_TAG_COUNT FROM tb_post p LEFT JOIN tb_category cat ON p.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m2.post_id, COUNT(*) AS common_tag_count FROM tb_post_tag_map m1 INNER JOIN tb_post_tag_map m2 ON m1.tag_id = m2.tag_id AND m2.post_id != #{postId} WHERE m1.post_id = #{postId} GROUP BY m2.post_id ) tag_match ON tag_match.post_id = p.id WHERE p.id != #{postId} AND p.public_access = true AND p.status = 'PUB' AND ( p.category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM tb_post WHERE id = #{postId}) OR tag_match.common_tag_count > 0 ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM tb_post WHERE id = #{postId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + COALESCE(tag_match.common_tag_count, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
